label: Pit gate incident
description: Defines a timed incident a PitGate map portal can fire, such as the Anomaly fleshbeast emergence.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: PitGateIncidentWorker subclass that implements this incident's execution logic.

baseChance.label: Base chance
baseChance.description: Relative selection weight used when the pit gate picks an incident to fire. Weights are normalized across all PitGateIncidentDefs on the active PitGate.

durationRangeTicks.label: Duration range (ticks)
durationRangeTicks.description: Range in game ticks, sampled once per fire, for how long the incident worker stays active.

usesThreatPoints.label: Uses threat points
usesThreatPoints.description: If true, the dev gizmo prompts for a threat-points value before force-firing this incident.

disableEnteringTicks.label: Disable entering ticks
disableEnteringTicks.description: Ticks after the incident fires during which the pit gate cannot be entered while this incident is active.

disableEnteringReason.label: Disable entering reason
disableEnteringReason.description: Reason shown (capitalized) for why the portal cannot be entered while this incident is active.

letterText.label: Letter text
letterText.description: Body text of the notification letter sent when this incident fires.

letterLabel.label: Letter label
letterLabel.description: Title of the notification letter sent when this incident fires.

basic-pit-gate-incident.label: Basic pit gate incident
basic-pit-gate-incident.description: A timed incident a PitGate can fire: worker class, selection weight, duration, and the notification letter.
